common.appDescription: A warm, non-judgmental health assistant for young people in Rwanda.

hero.title: Ask anything about your health. Get a friend's answer.
hero.desc: Inshuti is an AI assistant that gives young people honest, judgment-free answers on sexual and reproductive health — reviewed by professionals, available anytime, in English or Kinyarwanda.

topics.title: Wherever you're starting from
topics.desc: Six areas young people ask about most — tap one to jump straight into a conversation.

menstrualHealth.name: Menstrual Health
menstrualHealth.desc: Cycles, symptoms, products, and what's normal for your body.

pregnancy.name: Pregnancy
pregnancy.desc: Signs, timelines, prenatal care, and answering "what if."

relationships.name: Relationships
relationships.desc: Consent, communication, boundaries, and healthy partnerships.

familyPlanning.name: Family Planning
familyPlanning.desc: Contraception options explained clearly, without pressure.

hivStis.name: HIV & STIs
hivStis.desc: Prevention, testing, and treatment — with zero judgment.

mentalHealth.name: Mental Health
mentalHealth.desc: Stress, anxiety, and support for the feelings behind the questions.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.body: Ask reproductive health questions anytime, in your own words.

anonymous.title: Anonymous
anonymous.body: No names, no accounts. Your privacy is protected by design.

bilingual.title: Bilingual
bilingual.body: Full support in English and Kinyarwanda.

evidenceBased.title: Evidence Based
evidenceBased.body: Every answer is grounded in content reviewed by professionals.

footer.disclaimer: Inshuti provides general health information and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis or treatment. If you are in crisis or need urgent care, please contact a local health facility or the resources listed in the app.

chat.greeting: Muraho! I'm Inshuti — you can ask me anything about your body, relationships, or health. This chat is anonymous. What's on your mind today?
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type your question in English or Kinyarwanda…
chat.crisisBar: In crisis or need urgent help?
chat.crisisLink: Tap here for immediate support resources
chat.sourcesEmpty: No specific sources for this answer yet.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.quickTopicMenstrualHealth: What is a normal menstrual cycle?
chat.quickTopicPregnancy: What are early signs of pregnancy?
chat.quickTopicMentalHealth: How do I cope with stress?

mySpace.title: Your questions, your progress.
mySpace.desc: This is where your past conversations live, along with a few things Inshuti noticed that might help you next. Nothing here is linked to your name — it's tied only to this device.
mySpace.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all your history?
mySpace.clearError: Couldn't clear your history right now. Please try again.
mySpace.loadError: Couldn't load your history right now. Please try again.
mySpace.privacyTitle: This history is private to your device
mySpace.privacyDesc: It's never linked to your name or shared with anyone. You can clear it at any time.

login.title: Admin sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the Inshuti admin panel.
login.footer: Admin access is logged for security and safeguarding purposes.
login.heroBody: Review content, monitor conversations, and keep answers accurate — access here is logged and restricted to authorized reviewers.

dashboard.title: Good morning, {name}
dashboard.desc: Here's how Inshuti is doing today.

kb.title: Knowledge Base
kb.desc: Articles grounding chat answers, grouped by topic.
kb.pickTopic: Pick a topic and fill in both titles.

flagged.title: Flagged Content
flagged.desc: Messages flagged for crisis language, low confidence, or a user report.

settings.title: Settings
settings.restrictToKbDesc: When on, the AI must say it lacks reviewed information rather than answering from general knowledge when nothing is retrieved.
settings.autoFlagCrisisDesc: Automatically create a moderator flag when crisis language is detected. The safety response itself is never optional.
settings.autoDetectLanguageDesc: Override the UI language toggle when a message looks clearly EN or RW.
settings.crisisResourcesDesc: Shown to users when crisis language is detected. Keep contact numbers verified.
